meta.title: Contact: Free Case Estimate
meta.description: Contact Brodsky Law PLLC for a free, no-obligation case estimate. Tell us about your situation and we'll respond with options, pricing, and timeline, usually the same day.

hero.title: Free case estimate. No obligation.
hero.lead: Tell us a bit about your situation and we'll reply with estimated costs, timeline, payment options, and any questions we have, usually within a few hours.

servedCallout.heading: Have you been served?
servedCallout.body: If you've received divorce papers, time limits apply. Call us right away.

sidebarDisclaimer: The information provided on this website does not constitute legal advice and does not create an attorney-client relationship. Contacting us through this form does not establish an attorney-client relationship. Do not send confidential information until an attorney-client relationship has been established.

placeholders.details: Briefly describe your situation. The more context you provide, the better we can help.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

form.formDisclaimer: Submitting this form does not establish an attorney-client relationship. Do not include confidential information until an attorney-client relationship has been established.
form.submitError: Something went wrong and we could not send your message. Please try again or call us at 646-444-3120.
form.successBody: We've received your information and will be in touch shortly, usually within a few hours. If your matter is urgent, please call or text us directly at
